robots.name: Chip → CPU Pipeline
robots.description: Chain
robots.storeType: logic gates → 4-bit ALU → CPU execution. Watch gates become a working processor.
robots.creator: serge-ivo

robots.name: Pipeline Processor
robots.description: 5-stage instruction pipeline with hazard detection. Data forwarding, stalls, branch flush visualized. CPI comparison.
robots.creator: serge-ivo

robots.name: Wafer/Die Viewer
robots.description: Zoom from 300mm silicon wafer → die → standard cells → transistor cross-section. Yield simulation. Electron microscope feel.
robots.creator: serge-ivo

robots.name: CPU Builder
robots.description: Working 8-bit CPU — write assembly, watch fetch/decode/execute with animated data flow. 3 programs
robots.creator: serge-ivo

robots.name: Waveform Analyzer
robots.description: Neural net trained in-browser classifies digital signals
robots.storeType: clock, PWM, SPI, I2C, UART, noise. Oscilloscope display.
robots.creator: serge-ivo

robots.name: AI Circuit Classifier
robots.description: CLIP model identifies hand-drawn circuit components. Draw or pick presets — AI classifies AND/OR/resistor/capacitor/op-amp.
robots.creator: serge-ivo

robots.name: Binary Calculator
robots.description: Binary/hex/decimal converter with gate-level visualization. Ripple carry adder, shift-and-add multiplier, IEEE 754 floats.
robots.creator: serge-ivo

robots.name: Logic Gates
robots.description: AND, OR, NOT, NAND, XOR, XNOR, NOR — click inputs to toggle, see truth tables, watch signals propagate through gates.
robots.creator: serge-ivo

robots.name: ALU Simulator
robots.description: 8-bit ALU — click individual bits, choose ADD/SUB/AND/OR/XOR/NOT/SHL/SHR. See binary math + CPU flags (Z/N/C/V).
robots.creator: serge-ivo

robots.name: Flip-Flops & Counters
robots.description: SR Latch, D Flip-Flop, JK Flip-Flop, 4-bit Counter. Clock pulse, timing diagram, sequential logic explained.
robots.creator: serge-ivo

robots.name: Circuit Diagram Tool
robots.description: Draw circuits with wire/resistor/capacitor/op-amp tools. Auto-analyze: detect nodes, generate SPICE netlist.
robots.creator: serge-ivo

robots.name: Cache Simulator
robots.description: L1/L2 cache sim. Direct-mapped, set-associative. LRU/FIFO. Hit rate tracking.
robots.creator: serge-ivo

robots.name: FSM Builder
robots.description: Visual state machine editor. Add states, transitions. Simulate. Generate Verilog.
robots.creator: serge-ivo

robots.name: Binary Multiplier
robots.description: Shift-and-add multiplication visualized. Step through partial products bit by bit.
robots.creator: serge-ivo

robots.name: Karnaugh Map
robots.description: 2/3/4 variable K-maps. Click cells, auto-group, minimize Boolean expression.
robots.creator: serge-ivo

robots.name: Memory Hierarchy
robots.description: Registers → L1 → L2 → L3 → RAM → Disk. Access latency animation. Miss penalty calc.
robots.creator: serge-ivo

robots.name: Memory Hierarchy Simulator
robots.description: Visualize L1/L2/L3/RAM/Disk with cache replacement policies (LRU, FIFO, Random). Hit rate stats and latency breakdown.
robots.creator: serge-ivo

robots.name: CPU Pipeline Visualizer
robots.description: 5-stage pipeline (IF/ID/EX/MEM/WB) with hazard detection. Data forwarding, stalls, and CPI comparison.
robots.creator: serge-ivo

robots.name: FSM Designer
robots.description: Visual finite state machine editor. Drag states, draw transitions, simulate inputs, generate Verilog. Mealy/Moore modes.
robots.creator: serge-ivo

robots.name: Digital Signal Processor
robots.description: Generate signals (sine, square, noise), compute FFT, design FIR/IIR filters with interactive pole-zero plot.
robots.creator: serge-ivo
